embeds.description:
D&D Beyond is the most beginner-friendly tools available for sheet creation, but only a small subset of basic races and classes (called the System Reference Document, or SRD) are free for use. A majority of the races and classes require purchasing one or more books for use with their system.

For demonstration purposes, this walkthrough will create a character using only the free-to-use SRD.

To begin, go to https://www.dndbeyond.com/ and log in. If you don't already have an account, you will be prompted to register. Once logged in, go to `Collections`->`My Characters`, and then click `Create a Character`
Select your Character Creation method. We will choose `Standard`.
If you are new to DnD, click the checkbox for `Show Help Text`
